title: Colored Leaf Litter
description: Leaf Litter made more colorful and natural
body:
# Colored Leaf Litter

Give leaf litter some life! This Resource Pack enhances the visuals of leaf litter with **biome-based coloring** and **custom leaf color styles** — all **fully configurable** with [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts/).

> 🔧 **Requires Respackopts to work!**

## Features:

### Biome Colored Leaf Litter

Makes leaf litter match the **biome foliage color** — just like leaves do! Great for immersive seasonal or biome-specific builds.

![Colorful Leaf Litter in Plains and Desert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/905beb55f653e4a1c06bded91d184e12a0adb2a1.png)

### Color-Fixed Leaf Litter

Choose a specific leaf color — oak, birch, spruce, and more — to style all leaf litter globally.

![Spruce colored Leaf Litter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31725073358ae9b911431ba19d371d19bc4ca748.png)

## Config Options

<details>
<summary>Advanced Leaf Litter</summary>
<details>
<summary>Colorful Leaf Litter</summary>
True/False
</details>
<details>
<summary>Colored Leaf Litter</summary>
None/Oak/Birch/Spruce/Jungle/Acacia
</details>
</details>

## Compatibility:

- **Resource Pack**: Minecraft **1.21.5 - 1.21.9**

- Mod [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts/) needed
